# Yuan Heart Art

Yuan Heart Art is the English-facing brand of Xiamen Yuanxin Huijing Trading Co., Ltd.

The company supplies hand-painted oil paintings, printed oil art, and custom canvas art for Western residential interiors, museums, exhibition venues, hospitality projects, and public art spaces.

Core capabilities:
- Custom oil paintings from photos, references, room palettes, or curatorial briefs.
- Wholesale and trade supply for designers, galleries, decorators, hotels, and art buyers.
- Direct artist access through cooperation with the Putian Oil Painting Association.
- Hand-painted canvas, textured oil painting, printed oil art, custom size and color adjustment, framing coordination, packing, and international shipping support.

Primary contact:
- Irist
- Phone and WhatsApp: +86 18235608457
- Email: 379500068@qq.com
- Website: https://yuanheartart.com
